entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop important in West Africa.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study was conducted.

entities.name: EURYSTYLUS IMMACULATUS
entities.description: The head bug, a key pest of grain sorghum in West Africa.

entities.name: SOTUBA
entities.description: A location in Mali where sorghum genotypes were evaluated.

entities.name: KAMBOINSE
entities.description: A location in Burkina Faso where sorghum genotypes were evaluated.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SORGHUM HEAD BUG
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist attack by Eurystylus immaculatus.

entities.name: NATURAL SCREENING
entities.description: Evaluation of resistance to head bugs under natural field conditions.

entities.name: HEADCAGE SCREENING
entities.description: Evaluation of resistance to head bugs using controlled headcages.

entities.name: CULTIVAR NON-PREFERENCE
entities.description: A component of resistance where the pest avoids specific cultivars.

entities.name: PANICLE COMPACTNESS
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the sorghum panicle associated with bug numbers and grain damage.

entities.name: GRAIN DAMAGE
entities.description: The extent of damage to sorghum grains caused by head bugs.

entities.name: LONG GLUMES
entities.description: Glumes longer than 5 mm that contribute to resistance against Eurystylus immaculatus.

entities.name: DAYS TO GLUME OPENING
entities.description: The time taken for glumes to open after anthesis, contributing to resistance.

entities.name: GRAIN COVERING BY GLUMES
entities.description: The percentage of grain covered by glumes, contributing to resistance.

entities.name: GRAIN HARDNESS
entities.description: The physical hardness of the grain contributing to resistance.

entities.name: CSM 388
entities.description: A sorghum genotype resistant to head bugs and exhibiting non-preference.

entities.name: IS 14332
entities.description: A sorghum genotype resistant to head bugs.

entities.name: MALISOR 84-7
entities.description: A sorghum genotype resistant to head bugs.

entities.name: SAKOIKA
entities.description: A sorghum genotype resistant to head bugs.

entities.name: S 29
entities.description: A sorghum genotype resistant to head bugs.

entities.name: KAMBOINSE LOCAL
entities.description: A sorghum genotype resistant to head bugs.
